summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RankFlow Operations Panel - backend API and frontend UI integration tests

ui_bugs.issue: Tab switching within operations page doesn't update URL parameters
ui_bugs.workaround: Navigation via dashboard counters works correctly

passed_tests: Backend API /operations/stats returns correct structure and data
Dashboard Operations section displays with correct counters (0 Atrasados, 1 Pendentes, 6 Onboarding)
Navigation from dashboard counters to /operations?tab=X works correctly
Operations page loads at /operations route with proper structure
Operations page has 3 summary cards (Atrasados, Pendentes, Onboarding)
Client list displays correctly (6 clients found in onboarding tab)
Sidebar navigation to Operations page works
All dashboard operation counters navigate to correct tabs
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix tab switching URL update in OperationsPage component - the setActiveTab function should also update the URL search params when tabs are clicked directly
